title: Mountain Performance Pack
description: There is a new, updated Modpack called "Reaper Performance". Please download it instead Mountain Performance.
body:
There is a new, updated Modpack called "[Reaper Performance](https://modrinth.com/modpack/reaper-performance)". Please download it instead Mountain Performance.


A simple modpack with different mods to make your game more performant. Play with the highest framerate but keep everything typical of Minecraft or activate a shader (preinstalled) to get more out of it. The Best Game options are already enabled.

Tested with an Nvidia RTX 3060, up to 2300 FPS.

If you have problems, write me on Discord: Gerrxt(#2530)
